gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (171/ 8)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (171/ 8)
text: إِنَّ اللَّهَ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى لَيُعْطِي الْعَبْدَ مِنَ الثَّوَابِ عَلَى حُسْنِ الْخُلُقِ كَمَا يُعْطِي الْمُجَاهِدَ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ يَغْدُو عَلَيْهِ وَ يَرُوحُ .

en.hubeali: And from him, from Bakr Bin Salih, from Al Hassan Bin Ali, from Abdullah Bin Ibrahim, from Ali Bin Abu Ali Al Lahby,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having sid: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Blessed and High would be Giving from the Rewards to the servant based upon the good manners, just as He<sup>azwj</sup> would Give to the fighter in the Way of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> (waking up) in the morning and going upon it’.
en.sarwar: 12. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from Bakr ibn Salih from al-Hassan ibn Ali from ‘Abd Allah ibn Ibrahim from Ali ibn abu Ali al-Lahabi from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘Allah, the Most Blessed, the Most High, grants good rewards to a person of excellent moral behavior as He grants rewards to one who strives hard (does Jihad) in the way of Allah, mornings and evenings.’”
